mapper.select: SELECT tb.id, tb.batch_code, tb.product_id, bp.name AS product_name, bp.category AS product_category, bp.spec AS product_spec, bp.unit AS product_unit, tb.company_id, oc.name AS creator_company_name, tb.origin_place, tb.start_date, tb.status, tb.regulation_status, tb.remark, tb.public_remark, tb.internal_remark, tb.status_reason, tb.published_at, tb.frozen_at, tb.recalled_at, tb.created_at, tb.updated_at, tb.created_by, tb.updated_by FROM trace_batch tb LEFT JOIN base_product bp ON tb.product_id = bp.id LEFT JOIN org_company oc ON tb.company_id = oc.id WHERE tb.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
